Author: mole99
Content: Your database unit (dbu) of the layout is 0.05um. The dbu must be 0.001um and all geometry must be on-grid 0.05um.

Author: mole99
Content: You should be able to easily scale your whole layout :)

Author: mole99
Content: (And I can add a new check to the precheck)
